about_quotes.speaker: Ed Polcer
about_quotes.evidence: Ed Polcer is an active advocate for American jazz... attended Princeton University and joined Stan Rubin’s Tigertown Five.

about_quotes.speaker: Loren Schoenberg
about_quotes.evidence: Stan Rubin is mentioned only as an example of a band the interviewee played in: 'Stan Rubin’s band one night'
